elements.brief: Opaque handle to a loaded data resource
elements.description: This struct is an opaque handle managed by the engine. Use GetDDFData() to access the underlying protobuf message for read-only inspection.
elements.name: DataResource

elements.description: Returns a pointer to the decoded dmGameSystemDDF::Data protobuf message contained in the given data resource. The lifetime of the returned pointer is tied to the lifetime of the resource. It must not be freed by the caller.
elements.name: GetDDFData

returnvalues.doc: Pointer to the DDF data message, or 0 if the resource is invalid.
returnvalues.name: data

info.description: Helper types and accessors for the data resource type (`.datac`).
info.description_html: Helper types and accessors for the data resource type (.datac).
info.name: Data Resource
